commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor proof plus maintainer review of the docs-sync workflow/secret setup; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.; Cleared: The new workflow uses a fixed GitHub API dispatch target, a single explicit secret, and read-only repository permissions; I found no concrete supply-chain regression in the diff. commands.review_summary:
The PR moves maintainer/spec/history docs from `docs/` to `specs/`, adds a public `docs/clawhub.md` overview, updates repo guidance, and adds a workflow to dispatch OpenClaw docs sync on `docs/**` changes.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a docs/source-layout PR, not a bug report. Current-main inspection shows the requested layout and workflow are absent, and the PR diff supplies them.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor proof plus maintainer review of the docs-sync workflow/secret setup; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.
